title: pityrogramma × fendleriana
intro: Pityrogramma × fendleriana, also known as the Fendler's fern or the Pityrogramma fern, is a rare hybrid species of fern that belongs to the family Marattiales. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Pityrogramma × fendleriana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and is used by some cultures to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
